form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 9th of 12 at Flemington in the LR Roy Higgins on March 28 over 2600m, slow going 9 len behind Whisky On The Hill carrying 56kg at $101. Previously second-up 10th of 13 at Rosehill Bm78 on January 17 over 2400m, on heavy track; 27 len behind Bella Montagna carrying 60kg at $51. Fitter but see again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months favourite; came from midfield and won by 3 len at Warrnambool Mdn Hdle-Sw March 26 over 3200m on a soft track defeating Balinor carrying 69.5kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 6th of 9 at this track Bm78 on July 9 over 2100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Catani Gardens carrying 57.5kg at $16. Back on the flat a niggle but respecting.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Second-up favourite; won by 5 len at Sandown-Hillside Bm70 March 11 over 3000m defeating Balinor carrying 57.5kg at $3.60. Dominant last time and is well placed to repeat the dose.
